Title: Welcome to ChlamAtlas
Body: Let’s tour some key features to help you get started.

Title: Gene annotations
Body: Navigate through genomes, orthologs, and structures. Edit gene details as new information emerges.

Title: Mutant collections
Body: Browse the libraries of transposon, knockout, and chimera mutants.

Title: Mutant pipeline
Body: Add and update information as mutants progress through the creation and testing pipeline.

Title: Request new features
Body: Quickly suggest new features to include in the app

Title: Report bugs
Body: Alert the team to bugs so that they can be squashed.

Title: Pro tips
Body: Use the AppSheet app for improved syncing. Then add ChlamAtlas to your home screen!
